name: inteleon
flavor_texts: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.
Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3.
text: Inteleon is the Secret Agent Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: torrent, sniper (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 85, Defense: 65, Sp. Atk: 125, Sp. Def: 65, Speed: 120. Evolution line: sobble → drizzile → inteleon. Lore: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air. Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3.
